MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STAUFFER, DONALD J. COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENBROOK, MICHAEL SJOLBERG, THEO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 521 BRODERICK STREET (UPPER) SF. $6,977.95 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,977.95, STAYED UNTIL JAN-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION IS STAYED TO 1-19-94,8AM IF DEFTS COMPLY WITH THE FOLLOWING: LEAVE PREMISES FREE OF OCCUPANTS & POSSESSIONS. RETURN KEYS TO M. HALL LAW OFFICE. WAIVE RIGHT TO SEEK ANY STAYS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT AS LONG AS DEFTS ARE NOT IN DE- FAULT. NO FURTHER CLAIMS. WAIVE SEC DEPOSIT. SEE FILE.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STAUFFER, DONALD J. AS TO DEFENDANT BENBROOK, MICHAEL SJOLBERG, THEO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
